features: Editorial split layout: text left (cols 1-5), drop zone right (cols 6-12)
Double-Bezel drop zone with drag-and-drop + click-to-browse
Button-in-Button pattern for Browse and Upload CTAs
Eyebrow tag ('PDF Intelligence') above display heading
Client-side file validation: PDF-only, 20MB max
File info card with filename, size, remove button
Upload progress bar with spring animation and shimmer overlay
Error banner with shake animation and auto-dismiss (8s timeout)
Redirects to /chat?sessionId=<id>&filename=<name> on success
API_BASE reads from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var with localhost:3001 fallback
Reads sessionId and filename from URL search params
Redirects to / if sessionId is missing
Sticky Double-Bezel glass header with backdrop-blur, doc name, back link (next/link)
Scrollable message area with role='log' and aria-live='polite'
User bubbles right-aligned (shell bg), AI bubbles left-aligned (Double-Bezel)
Breathing avatar dot on AI messages
SSE streaming with real-time token appending
Skeleton shimmer loading state while waiting for first token
Streaming cursor (accent color, 530ms blink) during response
SR-only announcements for streaming and completion states
Auto-scroll to bottom with nearBottom threshold (100px)
AbortController cleanup on unmount
Input disabled during streaming, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
Auto-resizing textarea (max 160px height)
Suspense boundary wrapping useSearchParams
Fixed bottom Double-Bezel input bar with max-w-3xl
Abstract geometric SVG illustration with floating animation
Display heading: 'Ask anything about this document'
Subtext and filename display
3 starter chips (Double-Bezel small variant) with hover scale
Clicking a chip calls onSelectChip to send as first message
Staggered fadeUpBlur entry animations
fetchSSE: POST JSON, read ReadableStream, parse SSE data: lines
onChunk/onDone/onError callbacks
AbortController signal support
Handles [DONE] sentinel and done:true in parsed JSON
Buffer management for incomplete SSE lines
AbortError silently caught (no error callback)
softEase and entryEase cubic-bezier presets
springConfig: stiffness 120, damping 20
staggerContainer with 80ms stagger
scrollEntry, messageEntry, fadeUpBlur variant presets
All use blur filter transitions for Soft Structuralism style
Tailwind v4 with @theme inline for design tokens
Full Soft Structuralism color palette as CSS custom properties
Geist + Geist Mono font stack via CSS variables
Custom scrollbar (thin, transparent track, subtle thumb)
Streaming cursor keyframe (530ms blink)
Skeleton shimmer keyframe (1.5s infinite)
Progress bar shimmer overlay keyframe
Breathing animation keyframe for drop zone
next/font/google with Geist and Geist_Mono (latin subset)
Font variables applied to html element
SEO metadata matching stage-2b-copy.json (title, description, OG tags)
Body: min-h-dvh, bg-bg, text-text-1, font-sans
Multi-stage build: deps → builder → runner
Node 20 Alpine base
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL build arg (default: http://localhost:3001)
Standalone output mode for minimal production image
Copies .next/standalone, .next/static, and public
